pitch.explanation: Tracks the current note and melody in real time using a classic algorithm. Lightweight and low latency. Best for melodic instruments like voice, guitar, or piano.

genre.explanation: Classifies the musical style of the audio using a neural network trained on millions of Discogs tracks. Best for full mixes or rhythm-heavy sources.

mood.explanation: Estimates the emotional character of the audio using a neural network: energy, danceability, and overall mood. Best for full mixes.

pitch_crepe.explanation: More accurate pitch tracking using a neural network, especially for vocals with vibrato or subtle inflections. Heavier than classic pitch detection (Aubio YIN).

tempo.description: Tempo and BPM estimation via Aubio + TempoCNN
tempo.explanation: Dual tempo output: a classic algorithm (Aubio) for instant beat tracking and pulse generation, and a neural network (TempoCNN) for stable long-term accuracy and tempo feel. Useful for syncing visuals to rhythm.

dynamics.description: Onset and amplitude detection via Essentia
dynamics.explanation: Tracks when individual notes and hits start, and how loud they are in real time, using a lightweight signal processing algorithm. Best for per-instrument triggering of visual effects.
